final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,              // Chip clock signal.
    input reset,            // Synchronous reset signal.
    input enable,           // Enable signal.
    output [11:0] count     // Counter output signal with a data width of 12 bits.
);

reg [11:0] obf_counter;        // Counter register.

always @(posedge clk)
    if (reset) obf_counter <= 12'b0;                          // Reset to 0 if reset is active.
    else if (enable) obf_counter <= obf_counter + 12'b000000000001; // Increment obf_counter if enable is active.

assign count = obf_counter;                                   // Output obf_counter value.

endmodule
